steps.title: Use the follow-up reflection
steps.content: The sentence after the underlined one calls it "This incident" and says it leads Yung to a reflection about imagination foreshadowing reality. That means the underlined sentence provides a specific life event used to illustrate a broader phenomenon.

steps.title: Reject unsupported functions
steps.content: Choice A invents an unwillingness to separate reality and fantasy. Choice B invents later publishing difficulties. Choice D focuses on adventure, but the surrounding text uses the event to support a reflection about imagination and reality. The remaining choice describes that function. The answer is C.
